nasb.text: Any animal that divides the hoof and has the hoof split in two and chews the cud, among the animals, that you may eat.

esv.text: Every animal that parts the hoof and has the hoof cloven in two and chews the cud, among the animals, you may eat.

cnv.text: 在走獸中，分蹄成兩蹄趾，又反芻的走獸，你們都可以吃。

ccb.text: 凡蹄子分瓣且反刍的动物，你们都可以吃。
